title: Flavel, a victim of police violence, tells his story: 'If there hadn't been videos, no one would ever have believed me'
subhead: On March 16, the former musician went out to order food in Noisiel, in the eastern Paris suburbs. Police violently arrested him, as seen in a video widely shared online. He described to Le Monde the events that led him to file a complaint with the internal affairs agency.

Migrant Channel crossings: France-UK negotiations over border funding get bogged down
subhead: France and the UK are struggling to reach an agreement on a new British funding cycle as London, under pressure from UK public opinion, has demanded greater results from Paris in preventing migrants from crossing the English Channel.

title: UN Convention grants new protections to 40 species
subhead: The list includes several new species, such as the snowy owl, the hammerhead shark and the giant otter.

title: Is it ever a good idea to... wear leather pants?
subhead: In fashion, as in life, it is important to know the lines you should not cross. Or do so deliberately.

title: In wartime Tehran, rare photos capture daily life under bombardment
subhead: The photographs taken by an Iranian photographer and published by Le Monde offer a unique window into the capital's daily life. With 14 million inhabitants, Tehran has been shrouded in a media blackout since February 28. For his safety, the photographer has requested anonymity.

title: In Nabatieh, southern Lebanon, 'no one ventures outside anymore apart from rescue teams'
subhead: Like 42 other rescue workers since the war began on March 2, 16-year-old Joude Souleiman was killed by an Israeli drone strike in Nabatieh, the second-largest Shiite city in southern Lebanon, where only a few hundred people out of 75,000 residents remain.

title: The US and Israel are fighting different wars against the same foe
subhead: Donald Trump and Benjamin Netanyahu share many objectives. However, their respective public opinions and electoral interests may ultimately highlight significant differences between the two leaders.
